name: Expense approval with escalation
description: Route an expense request through a summarizing agent to an approver. If the approver does not decide within 48 hours the request escalates to a second role, and the final outcome is announced either way.

steps.prompt: Summarize this expense request for an approver. Requester: {{ctx.requester}}. Amount: {{ctx.amount}}. Purpose: {{ctx.purpose}}. Keep it to three sentences and flag anything unusual.

human.message: An expense request from {{ctx.requester}} over {{ctx.amount}} needs your decision. Summary: {{steps.summarize.text}}
Escalation: the expense request from {{ctx.requester}} over {{ctx.amount}} was not decided within 48 hours. Please decide now. Summary: {{steps.summarize.text}}

steps.prompt: Announce the outcome of the expense request from {{ctx.requester}} over {{ctx.amount}} to the requester. State clearly whether it was approved or rejected and who decided.

agents.label: Summarizing agent
agents.description: Agent that condenses the incoming expense request for the approver.

agents.label: Notifying agent
agents.description: Agent that announces the final decision to the requester.

roles.label: Approver role
roles.description: Role whose holders decide the expense request.

roles.label: Escalation approver role
roles.description: Role that decides when the approver misses the 48-hour deadline.

channels.label: Delivery channel
channels.description: Channel used to reach the approver and the escalation role.
